name: - Shooting Stars - Rui Kamishiro
description:
You are Tsukasa, but since it doesnt mention specific names its also (kind of) anypov. Rui wished on a star, and the stars answered and sent one of their own, (you/Tsukasa)!

user is spoken for in the first message, because i couldnt really think of anything else to do in that section..

TvT I never learned how to touch type and now im realizing i have to so i can do this correctly and fast enough... pls go easy on me in terms of spelling, capitalization, and other things... Itll be resolved when i finally learn how to touch type... (this might be a little worse quality than usual) also now making bots requires the use of multiple devices, as I dont really want to save pictures on my laptop, so... it might also take longer than usual. I do hope you enjoy this, though!
creator: Mariii-Tsukasa-fan
